top_signals.title: Global stocks fall as US-Iran hostilities escalate
top_signals.summary: New clashes over Strait of Hormuz control put investors in ‘risk-off’ mode
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Markets Weigh Fresh US Strikes on Iran | The Asia Trade 7/13/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Singapore with Shery Ahn and Avril Hong, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near lower end of PoS energy intensity
top_signals.summary: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the proof-of-stake networks studied.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ali Khamenei was a monster. The U.S. made him a martyr.
top_signals.summary: For IRGC commander Ahmad Vahidi and other regime leaders, this funeral was probably more important than their 60-day negotiations with the U.S.
